win_condition: First player to place all 10 authority stars wins immediately

categories.label: Markets Built
categories.description: Stars placed by helping construct markets

categories.label: Artifact Sets
categories.description: Stars placed by trading in artifact card sets

categories.label: Allegiance Milestones
categories.description: Stars placed by reaching faction allegiance milestones

categories.label: Recruit Abilities
categories.description: Stars placed via recruit card abilities

categories.label: Other Actions
categories.description: Stars placed via special board spaces or other abilities

notes: The game ends immediately when any player places their 10th authority star. There is no second place.
